QCOM.notes: ~2/3 revenue from China; QCT chips subject to BIS export controls; tariff risk elevated

NVDA.notes: H100/H20 restricted; DataCenter revenue partially at risk from BIS/CSET rules

AMD.notes: MI300X exports to China restricted; data center GPU sales blocked

INTC.notes: Advanced node exports require BIS license; fab partnerships restricted

AVGO.notes: Networking and storage chips sold to Huawei; some SKUs restricted

TSM.notes: US CHIPS Act beneficiary; fab business mostly ex-China
